capabilities.description: Core AI interaction cycle: processes text or voice input, retrieves memory, and generates an LLM response.
Dynamic switching between AI 'Souls' or personalities, affecting system prompt and behavior.
capabilities.notes: Accessible via F3 shortcut in CLI.

capabilities.description: Switching between AI backends (Ollama, Kobold, Cloud) and selecting specific local models.
capabilities.notes: Accessible via F2 shortcut in CLI. Impacts performance.

capabilities.description: On-the-fly modification of AI behavior using the /istruzione or /instruction commands.
Access to long-term memory, identity profiles, and chat history. Includes Tabula Rasa protocol.
capabilities.notes: Resetting memory clears episodic chat databases.

capabilities.description: Text-to-Speech conversion using Piper or System engines. Toggleable output.
capabilities.notes: F5 toggle. Can be directed to Local or Web UI.

capabilities.description: Speech-to-Text conversion using System/Faster-Whisper engines. Toggleable listening.
Manual activation of the microphone via hotkey (Ctrl+Shift) or F8 toggle.
Real-time ASCII terminal interface with hardware telemetry and system status bar.
capabilities.notes: Main interaction point for the user.

capabilities.description: Native Browser Interface (localhost:7070) providing Chat and Configuration panels.
capabilities.notes: Syncs with the Core system state.

capabilities.description: Standalone GUI and CLI menus for editing detailed system configuration (config.json).
capabilities.notes: F7 shortcut. Reloads system after save.

capabilities.description: Dynamic documentation system listing active commands and module explanations.
Hardware monitoring (GPU VRAM, CPU Load, RAM) and AI backend status verification.
Generates AI images from text prompts using Pollinations or Airforce APIs.
Capability to list, count, and read files from the local filesystem.
Direct execution of shell commands through the AI brain.
capabilities.notes: Requires user oversight. Full terminal access.

capabilities.description: Smart home device control simulation and status reporting.
Hardware volume control and audio mute/unmute functions.
capabilities.notes: Directly interacts with OS audio mixers.

capabilities.description: Takes snapshots via the connected webcam for environmental awareness.
Immersive scenario management: loading characters and scenes for AI interaction.
Process monitoring tool to prevent duplicate instances and manage Zentra threads.
Software-level system reboot to refresh configuration and plugins.
Full system internationalization (translations) for English and Italian.
capabilities.notes: Affects terminal logs, UI labels, and voice responses.
